evaluators.name: VR Safety Training Quote Under 15k for 50 People
evaluators.description: Checks if the user requested a quote for a qualifying VR safety training package for 50 participants under $15,000, and that the chosen package is the cheapest qualifying option.

evaluators.name: AR Product Launch Brief Under 40k With 100k+ Reach
evaluators.description: Checks if the user created a project brief for an AR product launch campaign under $40,000 with expected reach of at least 100,000 people.

evaluators.name: Shortlist 3 VR Case Studies Across Retail, Healthcare, and Education
evaluators.description: Checks if the user saved three VR case studies—one each from retail, healthcare, and education—to the same saved collection.

evaluators.name: Configure New York Pop-Up Installation 500–800 Attendees
evaluators.description: Checks if the user saved a New York pop-up configuration for ~500–800 attendees with at least two interactive zones, one photo booth, an estimated total between $25k and $35k, and submitted it for a quote.

evaluators.name: Register for Beginner XR Strategy Workshop Within 60 Days Under $300
evaluators.description: Checks if the user registered for a beginner-level XR strategy event within 60 days of registration, costing under $300, with exactly one ticket.

evaluators.name: Apply to Mid-Level XR UX/Product Design Role Without CV Upload
evaluators.description: Checks if the user applied to a mid-level XR UX or product design role requiring about 3–5 years of experience, using only text fields (no CV upload).

evaluators.name: Agency Partner Inquiry for White-Label XR Production Over $60k in US and EU
evaluators.description: Checks if the user submitted an agency partner contact inquiry focused on white-label XR production, with typical budgets over $60,000 and regions covering US and EU markets.

evaluators.name: Reading List With Museum/Exhibition and Retail Articles
evaluators.description: Checks if the user saved at least two museum/exhibition articles and one retail article to the same reading list/collection.
